page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.se1.2xlarge is an x86_64 architecture server powered by an Intel Xeon 8163 processor running at 2.5 GHz. It features 8 dedicated physical cores with 1 thread per core, backed by 33 MB of L3 cache. The system is equipped with 64.0 GB of RAM, providing a high memory-to-vCPU ratio of 8.0 GB per core. It does not include local storage or dedicated GPU hardware, and operates on a KVM hypervisor with a baseline network bandwidth of 2 Gbps.

Benchmark data indicates that the processor delivers modest compute performance, with stress-ng and Geekbench single-core and multi-core scores falling in the bottom 25%. Memory bandwidth tests show average performance for uncached large-block reads and writes at 39.75 GB/sec and 36.51 GB/sec respectively, though cached small-block reads are weaker. Redis SET operations achieve average throughput at 5.94 million operations per second, while LLM inference speeds for a small 135M model are average but drop to poor for a medium 7B model.

From a resource density perspective, the ecs.se1.2xlarge offers a cost-effective profile for memory-intensive workloads that do not demand high-frequency CPU performance. The primary tradeoff is the older Intel Xeon 8163 architecture, which results in lower single-threaded execution speeds and weaker compression performance, as seen in the poor gzip and bzip3 benchmark results.

This server configuration is suitable for memory-bound applications such as caching layers, in-memory databases like Redis, moderate database operations, and general-purpose enterprise applications that require a larger memory footprint without intensive computational overhead.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.se1.2xlarge is a memory-optimized virtual server featuring 8 dedicated Intel Xeon 8163 CPU cores running at 2.5 GHz and 64.0 GB of RAM. Built on the x86_64 architecture and managed via a KVM hypervisor, this instance provides a high memory-to-core ratio of 8.0 GB per core but does not include local storage or GPU accelerators. Baseline network performance is rated at 2 Gbps. Benchmarks show modest compute capabilities, with single-core and multi-core performance generally ranking in the bottom 25%, while large-block memory bandwidth and Redis SET operations perform at average levels. The instance is qualitatively cost-effective for memory-intensive tasks that do not require high-performance compute. It is best suited for in-memory caching, database hosting, and memory-bound enterprise workloads.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.se1.2xlarge is a memory-optimized server featuring 8 dedicated Intel Xeon cores, 64 GB of RAM, and a 2 Gbps network baseline, designed specifically for memory-bound enterprise workloads.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.se1.2xlarge is an x86_64 server featuring 8 dedicated Intel Xeon cores and 64 GB RAM, optimized for memory-intensive enterprise workloads.
tagline: A memory-optimized virtual server featuring a high memory-to-core ratio for caching and memory-bound enterprise workloads.
bullet_points: 8 dedicated Intel Xeon 8163 CPU cores at 2.5 GHz
64.0 GB of system memory providing 8.0 GB per core
No local storage or GPU hardware included
Well-suited for in-memory databases and caching layers
